name: Termite Worker

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.tell: It steps in and snaps with a short bite.
attacks.howToAvoid: Block it from the front or stay just outside its short reach.
attacks.notes: Its basic hit to keep you busy while other termites position around you.

attacks.name: Charged Bite
attacks.tell: It draws its head back before a longer biting lunge.
attacks.howToAvoid: Sidestep it; backing away in a straight line often is not enough.
attacks.notes: Gives it extra reach in tight tunnels.

attacks.name: Acid Shot
attacks.tell: It aims its head and spits an acid ball that leaves a splatter on impact.
attacks.howToAvoid: Move sideways and do not step into the splatter after the impact.
attacks.notes: The danger is not just the projectile, but the acidic patch left behind.

description: A tough worker termite that fills the den, woodpile, and some deeper late-game routes. It may be the basic termite variant, but in groups it is still very dangerous.
behavior: It patrols the tunnels of its colony, occasionally gnaws on the walls, and reacts violently to intruders. It keeps simple termite bites, but also spits an acidic projectile that leaves a harmful splatter behind.
interactionWithPlayer: It is aggressive on sight. If you push too deep into the colony, it mixes bites with acid shots to force you into awkward close-quarters fights.
interactionWithCreatures: It does not pick fights with other creatures unless they attack nearby termites first. It always remains passive toward fellow workers, soldiers, and the Termite King.
strategy: Do not underestimate the worker just because it is the basic variant. Salty and stabbing still work very well, but the real key is avoiding the acid so you do not lose armor or get pinned in the splatter.
respawnInfo: 3 days by default. In the Undershed it takes 2 days.
specialTraits: It is immune to dust. Its acid spit counts as burning-type damage and applies a temporary resistance/defense reduction.
